title: How the categories are defined
body: The continental totals remain intact even where a country is discussed through layered regulation rather than a standalone COP statute. The top-tier count therefore captures binding or enacted protection instruments, including systems built through multiple legal layers.

title: What the map covers
body: This analysis keeps the headline figure of 54 AU states reviewed and maps the countries discussed explicitly in the brief against the wider continental picture.

title: Limits of the evidence base
body: The map highlights the countries discussed explicitly in the brief and leaves the wider continental total undisturbed. Jurisdictions not discussed individually remain within the aggregate categories.

title: Source brief
body: All content on this page is drawn from the DIID policy brief and the country examples it sets out. The analysis stays within the classifications and evidence presented there.
